flaws.description: src/analytics.ts:13 credentials-include (real, non-decoy) is never emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in any auditRuns entry — removed from the emitted issue set and from gate-3-security's runState.gates fingerprint/count at every run.
flaws.expectedGraderFinding: false negative on credentials-include (recall drops below 0.9 threshold)

flaws.description: src/sdk.ts:69 console-debug-guard (decoy) IS emitted by gate-3-security's stdout in every auditRuns entry — added to the emitted issue set and to gate-3-security's runState.gates fingerprint/count at every run.
flaws.expectedGraderFinding: false positive / decoyFalsePositives entry on console-debug-guard
